channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/24)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的信息量不小，尤其是 **DeepSeek V4 发布**和 **Claude Code 的更新**，绝对是今天的头条。另外，关于“Vibe Coding”的讨论和几个能直接上手的 Agent/编程工具也挺有意思。咱们别光看个标题，我帮你把重点和价值都拎出来。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的信息量不小，尤其是 **DeepSeek V4 发布**和 **Claude Code 的更新**，绝对是今天的头条。另外，关于“Vibe Coding”的讨论和几个能直接上手的 Agent/编程工具也挺有意思。咱们别光看个标题，我帮你把重点和价值都拎出来。

item.title: kyegomez/OpenMythos
item.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature. | 近期热门 | 总 9774 stars
item.author: kyegomez

item.title: EvoLinkAI/awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
item.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments. | 近期热门 | 总 2847 stars
item.author: EvoLinkAI

item.title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
item.description: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT. | 近期热门 | 总 1939 stars
item.author: OpenCoworkAI

item.title: 432539/gpt2api
item.description: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 · 技术交流QQ 群 382446 | 近期热门 | 总 945 stars

item.title: leigest519/OpenGame
item.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games | 近期热门 | 总 772 stars
item.author: leigest519

item.title: ZeroZ-lab/cc-design
item.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents | 近期热门 | 总 615 stars
item.author: ZeroZ-lab

item.title: Quorinex/Freebuff2API
item.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment. | 近期热门 | 总 384 stars
item.author: Quorinex

item.title: levelsio/superlevels
item.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking! | 近期热门 | 总 257 stars
item.author: levelsio

item.title: heider-x/vela
item.description: AI-powered IDE for novel writing — local LLM + RAG, privacy-first, BYOK. For web fiction authors and creative writers. | 近期热门 | 总 71 stars
item.author: heider-x

item.title: Design.MD - 即插即用的设计系统，你的AI编程助手可直接读取
